summary.summary: Bumps the development app version constant APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig from 0.8.4.17 to 0.8.4.18 (diff:570009875c18, file:8aad2853cca1). The commit message records this as a CI version bump (commit:1373165c2314).
summary.userFacingImpact: The change updates only a development/version constant in a configuration file (Config.xcconfig) and contains no other code or behavior changes in the supplied diff (diff:570009875c18, file:8aad2853cca1). Based on the provided sources, there is no direct evidence in this change alone of any user-facing functional impact; however, evidence is limited to the supplied files and human review is recommended to confirm there are no downstream effects (commit:1373165c2314, diff:570009875c18, file:8aad2853cca1).
